title: Cobblestone fix
description: A vanilla mod that changes the mechanics of cobblestone mining.
body:
A vanilla mod that changes the mechanics of cobblestone mining.

Now the stone will drop stone fragments from which it will be possible to craft cobblestone, as shown in the pictures in the gallery.

![creating cobblestone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9266949925944003c5b38d7825f21d3d4fb95ae.png)
